text: Science has a clearer story about the spacing effect than social media does. The spacing effect suggests that spreading out learning over time leads to better retention. Yet, many believe cramming works just as well. But does it really? Research shows spaced learning can enhance memory recall by over 50%. So, next time you study, try breaking it up! Your brain will thank you. Curious for more science tips? Hit subscribe!
